positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u41,axiom,
    ~low_survival_rate(colorectal_cancer)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~cholangiocarcinoma(X0) | bile_duct_cancer(X0)).

cnf(u33,axiom,
    cholangiocarcinoma != colorectal_cancer).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~severe_cancer(X0) | deadly_disease(X0)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    mild_flu != cholangiocarcinoma).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~deadly_disease(X0) | low_survival_rate(X0)).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    bile_duct_cancer != colorectal_cancer).

    ~bile_duct_cancer(X0) | severe_cancer(X0)).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    mild_flu != bile_duct_cancer).

cnf(u52,axiom,
    low_survival_rate(bile_duct_cancer)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    mild_flu(mild_flu)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~mild_flu(X0) | low_survival_rate(X0)).

cnf(u54,axiom,
    low_survival_rate(cholangiocarcinoma)).

cnf(u37,negated_conjecture,
    ~severe_cancer(colorectal_cancer)).

cnf(u47,axiom,
    severe_cancer(bile_duct_cancer)).

cnf(u48,axiom,
    deadly_disease(bile_duct_cancer)).

cnf(u49,axiom,
    bile_duct_cancer(cholangiocarcinoma)).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    bile_duct_cancer != cholangiocarcinoma).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    cholangiocarcinoma(cholangiocarcinoma)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    bile_duct_cancer(bile_duct_cancer)).

cnf(u51,axiom,
    low_survival_rate(mild_flu)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    mild_flu != colorectal_cancer).

cnf(u50,axiom,
    severe_cancer(cholangiocarcinoma)).

cnf(u53,axiom,
    deadly_disease(cholangiocarcinoma)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define colorectal_cancer(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
